description_long: This stereo sound system consists of two rectangular speaker units with a modern, minimalist design. The front face of each speaker features a large woofer and a smaller tweeter, both set into a matte black panel surrounded by dark wood-finished sides. One speaker displays a small digital screen with the number '23' illuminated, indicating a digital interface or volume display. The sides and back panels are finished in a dark wood texture, giving the speakers a classic yet contemporary appearance. The speakers appear to be constructed from a combination of wood, plastic, and metal, with the front panels likely made of plastic or composite material. The overall build suggests a robust and high-quality audio device suitable for home or studio use.
description: A pair of rectangular stereo speakers with dark wood sides, matte black front panels, and visible woofers and tweeters. One speaker features a small digital display.
description_view_0: Front view showing both speakers' drivers, tweeters, and a digital display on the right unit.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dark wood finish and the depth of the speaker cabinets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned backs of both speakers with a matte black finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wood finish and the rectangular profile of the cabinets.
attribute_brand_logo: Small white 'microlab' text logo on the lower right of each front panel.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: No traditional grille; drivers are exposed with visible circular mounting screws and smooth black cones.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A small digital display and likely touch or button controls on the lower right front of one speaker; no other visible controls.
